allow: Bash(python scripts/search.py "SaaS ERP business management dashboard professional yellow ink minimal" --design-system -p "Filey ERP")
Bash(python scripts/search.py "dashboard table form accessibility layout consistency loading empty-state" --domain ux -n 14)
Bash(python scripts/search.py "dashboard table form responsive accessibility" --stack react)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['id'],'|',p['name'],'|',p.get\('status'\)\) for p in d] if isinstance\(d,list\) else print\('RESP:',json.dumps\(d\)[:300]\)")

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\iamvi\\Documents\\GitHub\\Filey-erp\\package.json" | Select-String -Pattern '"dev"|"scripts"|vite' ; Write-Output "---PORTS---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5173,5174,3000,4173,8080 } | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---NODE PROCS---"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "name='node.exe'" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessId,@{n='cmd';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(90,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Write-Output "CustomerDetail:"; \(Get-Content src/pages/CustomerDetail.tsx | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Output "SupplierDetail:"; \(Get-Content src/pages/SupplierDetail.tsx | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)
PowerShell(git add src/components/ui.tsx src/components/PreviewModal.tsx src/components/ToolBrowserModal.tsx src/components/PdfToolbox.tsx)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 1420 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "killed pid\(s\) on 1420" } else { "nothing listening on 1420" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:1420/src/index.css" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\); bytes=$\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'app-light|radial-gradient'\) { "OK: gradient utility compiled into CSS" } else { "WARN: gradient not found in output" } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($pkgs = @\('react','react-dom','typescript','vite','react-router-dom','tailwindcss','@supabase/supabase-js','framer-motion','motion','recharts','lucide-react','@tauri-apps/api','@tauri-apps/cli','vitest','pdf-lib','pdfjs-dist','@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu','react-day-picker','date-fns','@number-flow/react','autoprefixer','postcss','@vitejs/plugin-react','@testing-library/react'\); foreach \($p in $pkgs\) { $v = \(npm view $p version 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 1\); "{0,-32} {1}" -f $p, $v })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 1420 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "stopped dev server" } else { "dev server not running" })
PowerShell(git add package.json package-lock.json vite.config.ts src/components/PreviewModal.tsx src/lib/pdfTools.ts)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:1420/src/index.css" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; $c = $r.Content; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\); bytes=$\($c.Length\)"; foreach \($k in @\('FFD600','radial-gradient','bg-primary','--tw-'\)\) { "{0,-16} {1}" -f $k, \($\(if \($c -match [regex]::Escape\($k\)\) {'present'} else {'absent'}\)\) } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 1420 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; "restarting")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:1420/src/index.css" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; $c = $r.Content; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)"; foreach \($k in @\('#f6f5f1','#dedbd2','FFD600'\)\) { "{0,-12} {1}" -f $k, \($\(if \($c -match [regex]::Escape\($k\)\) {'present'} else {'absent'}\)\) }; if \($c -match 'radial-gradient\\\(1200px'\) { 'WASH still present' } else { 'wash removed \(flat bg\)' } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
